Name: weather-last-updated
Description: Human-readable timestamp of last weather mirror (Open-Meteo)

Name: app-fault
Description: Active when weather data is from fallback (not live Open-Meteo)

Name: openfdd-faults-present
Description: True when one or more FDD faults are active

Name: openfdd-optimization-enabled
Description: Commandable optimization enable (BACnet-writable; REST API read-only)
